summary: M443 — Map: 2-incoming-per-node pass + Silas weapon-reward fix. Map: added Pass 3 to the FTL hex layout that pumps each to-node up to ≥2 incoming when there's a near-diagonal candidate with degree budget; in-cap tightened to 2 so total degree per node never exceeds 4 (verified 0 over-cap across 226 interior trunk nodes). 60%/65% of interior nodes now have ≥2 in/out paths. Silas weapon-reward fix: build-preset weapon keys ('2h_sword'/'2h_axe') were never matching WEAPON_BASES ('sword2h'/'axe2h'), so generateItem returned null and the prologue Silas gift dropped only 15 XP. Added KEY_ALIAS map + walks all the build's preferences in order until one resolves; fighter Execution (2H) now actually receives a Greatsword. Shield drop now respects two-handed weapons (no useless buckler when the build wants a 2H weapon).
